content: Multiply Hourly Pay by 2080 to get estimated annual pay.

Okay, I can create a calculated column that estimates annual pay by multiplying the hourly pay by 2080.

```
Multiply(Value(HourlyPay), 2080)
```

This expression will produce a **Numeric** output.

Suggested column name: **Estimated Annual Pay**

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Use this expression|Validate with sample data|Explain this expression}}
